title: Crispy Turkey Panini
description: A simple Italian-inspired dish using piadina bread and crispy turkey.
instructions: Preheat a panini press or grill to medium-high heat.
Slice the turkey breast and season with salt and pepper.
Brush both sides of the piadina bread with olive oil.
Place one slice of bread in the panini press or grill, followed by a slice of turkey, a sprinkle of cheese, a few leaves of basil, and another slice of bread.
Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the bread is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Cut the panini in half and serve immediately.
